{{Quote|The mountain behind you is named Sammie.|[[Raal Yorta]]|<ref name="Rookies: Rendezvous">''[[Rookies: Rendezvous]]''</ref>}}
'''Sammie Staable''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Sometime before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Sammie Staable became an associate of the gambler [[Raal Yorta]] and the pickpocket [[Smileredon-Verdont]].<ref name="Rendezvous" /> Prior to the Battle of Yavin, Sammie Staable, Smileredon-Verdont and Raal Yorta attempted a heist on the ''Coral Vanda''.<ref name="TCSWE-CoralVanda">{{CSWECite|I|140|''Coral Vanda''}}</ref>

Along with Raal Yorta, Staable captured [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] criminal [[Ten-Suckers Madoom]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. Unfortunately, the duo did not submit the correct paperwork when collecting their [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]], and thus received only 245 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for Madoom's capture.<ref name="Rendezvous" />

It was at that point that Sammie revealed to Raal that he was going to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Later, in an Ord Mantell bar called the [[Power Dive]], Raal attempted to talk Sammie out of it. Sammie would not hear of it, and pulled a blaster on Raal, taking him hostage on his own ship.<ref name="Rendezvous" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Sammie Staable was based on a character roleplayed by [[Ariela|Ariel]], in the ''Rebel Breakout'' scenario of the [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']] gamemastered by [[Pablo Hidalgo]].
